feedback_text: The new update is absolutely terrible. It keeps crashing when I try to open a message.
Love the dark mode! Much easier on the eyes.
App is okay, but it frequently disconnects from the server.
Please add a way to schedule messages, it's my most requested feature.
Crashes immediately on startup after the iOS update.
The UI is a bit confusing to navigate.
Notifications are delayed by 10 minutes. Fix this bug!
Great experience, customer support was very helpful.
It freezes when I upload a large photo.
Not bad, but could use some performance optimizations.
Stop asking me to rate the app every time I open it!
